title: pyrrosia abbreviata
intro: Pyrrosia abbreviata is a type of plant species belonging to the Polypodiaceae family, commonly known as the polypody fern. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrrosia abbreviata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatic pain, and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Pyrrosia abbreviata often involve drying the leaves and using them in tea or infusions, or processing them into capsules or tablets for medicinal use.
